title: Frozen Lands
description: A 1.21 Winter/Icy themed vanilla+ modpack for a cozy winter :)
body:
Frozen Lands is a winter themed modpack.

It is mostly made out of Winter and Christmas mods but also includes QoL mods as well as some more biome mods (like betterend and betternether).

The main point of this modpack is to make it feel like you're in winter.

Here are some ingame screenshots to show what a gameplay with it looks like :)

![Frozen Lands prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/923b240584bf98984a10de96ab923ead9d69fc7a.jpeg)

![Frozen Lands prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ffccc883f5afb2635dcec7e43e2a14f28788ca6.jpeg)

![Frozen Lands Prev3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eff122626d5958041c04b80c705c13965d14f35.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
